description: Agent-process focused Binance action prompts for balances, orders, fills, cancel, and create-order intents.

questions.question: Using Binance, fetch my current account balances and summarize non-zero assets.
Using Binance, list my current open orders.
Using Binance, fetch recent BTC-USDT orders with SELL side only and a small limit.
Using Binance, fetch my latest fills for BTC-USDT.
Using Binance, cancel this order if it exists: 123456789.
Using Binance, prepare a BUY market order for BTC-USDT using quote size of 0.50 to 1.00 USD equivalent and ask for approval before execution.
